title: Cake HUD
description: Your HUD is now cake ...you're welcome (─‿─)
body: ## Just a resource pack that makes your HUD cake **¯\\\_(ツ)\_/¯** * Adds a cakey vibe to your HUD! * The xp number color change requires Puzzle (or Optifine) ## Want less (but still some) cake? Check this out :) # More coming soon (•̀ᴗ-) #### If you like this, see my other resource packs ## Compatibility Fully compatible with AppleSkin! ### _______________________________________ *Should* work with any launcher versions 1.20.2+ * If you have issues, let me know Should *NOT* work with any versions pre-1.20.2 * hud sprites worked differently * I will not be making older versions, so... * feel free to port it/remake it/whatever * (a link/reference would be nice if you do) ## Issues [![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49eac7d4916630c1ca7a85fe90f40e2363ae80eb.png)](https://discord.gg/W3T34eVScQ)
